No tests matched: nonexistent

Available tests (first 3):
  test/alpha_test.rb AlphaTest#test_one
  test/alpha_test.rb AlphaTest#test_two
  test/beta_test.rb BetaTest#test_first

Usage: bin/test [options] [pattern ...]
  Patterns filter by file path, class name, or method name (case-insensitive)
  Multiple patterns use OR logic (any must match)
  --match-all  Switch to AND logic for multiple patterns
  -l, --list   List matching tests without running them

Examples:
  bin/test session              # run tests with 'session' in file/class/method
  bin/test util kv              # run tests matching 'util' OR 'kv'
  bin/test --match-all session basic # run tests matching both 'session' AND 'basic'
  bin/test -l                   # list all tests
